calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-05-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Miles Lendway CSR#13684.

Shauna L. Matlin, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Eugene Choi.
Witness, Chris Collins, sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Donald Brett Roberts.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibit:
1-Notice of time and place of trial
2-Lease Agreement
3-3-Day Notice attached to Complaint
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 487 Potreto Avenue #2, San Francisco, California 94110 - County of San Francisco.

Damages $11,635.00
Holdover damages $3,033.10
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $385.00
Other: Process Server Fees $250.00
for a Total Judgment of $15,303.10

Plaintiff will account for the security deposit as required by Civil Code section 1950.5. Any credit due to Defendant will be applied to reduce the balance of the judgment.

Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-05-2016 Assigned To Trial Court
